content_focus: Whatever topic in your niche is currently trending or going viral right now
Fresh news the audience hasn't already seen everywhere
Stories with a strong 'wow' or 'is this real' hook people are talking about
Topics with clear mass appeal to your target audience
Only genuinely trending topics viewers would actually care about — no filler
avoid_topics: Dry corporate/funding news with no visual hook
Topics needing real human actors or celebrity faces on screen

format.style: Dark, cinematic, premium look. B-roll on top, talking avatar on bottom, karaoke captions.

virality_rules: Hook must shock or trigger curiosity in the first 4 seconds
At least one mind-blowing fact that forces comments or shares
Visuals must be easy for text-to-video AI to generate and relevant to the topic
Prefer news from the last 7-14 days; fresher = better
